Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Jun-15-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Judge Gail Dekreon, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Bary K. Matson, Esq. appeared for petitioner Doreen Julie Benetti, the Guardian ad Litem for the minor, Jeannie Benetti.
Order waiving Petitioner's appearance at today's hearing was filed on January 7, 2010.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $29,058.37.
Attorney's Fees - $7,264.59.
Costs - $85.06.

The net balance of $21,708.72 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, located at 7375 West 52nd Avenue, Arvada, Colorado, 80002. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Ccourt Order, or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

The Court further Orders that the percentages used in the Petition for calculation of Claimant's portion of the total settlements (15%), attorneys' fees (25%) and costs (15%) be used for all future distributions and settlements reached with defendants of bankruptcy trusts in this case.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.
